reasoning: A deal for Disney/ESPN to acquire parts of the NFL Media unit (NFL Network and RedZone) was agreed to in August 2025 and approved by NFL owners in October 2025. However, multiple news reports state that the transaction requires a lengthy regulatory review that is expected to take at least a year. Disney's Head of Corporate Development stated that a late-2026 close is the best case scenario. Moreover, ESPN's Chair confirmed that the assets will remain under NFL control through at least the beginning of 2026. Therefore, it is virtually impossible for Disney to have control of the NFL Media unit before the end of 2025.
